queries.question: What are the levels of courses that are available at all language schools?
queries.sql: SELECT Course_Levels.level  from Language_Schools_Course_Levels join Course_Levels on Language_Schools_Course_Levels.course_levels_id = Course_Levels.id join Language_Schools on Language_Schools_Course_Levels.language_schools_id = Language_Schools.id   GROUP BY Language_Schools_Course_Levels.course_levels_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Language_Schools_Course_Levels.language_schools_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Language_Schools)

queries.question: Show me the level of courses each language school offers.
queries.sql: select language_schools.name , course_levels.level from Language_Schools_Course_Levels join Course_Levels on Language_Schools_Course_Levels.course_levels_id = Course_Levels.id join Language_Schools on Language_Schools_Course_Levels.language_schools_id = Language_Schools.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?level WHERE {
  ?language_schools_course_levels a :Language_Schools_Course_Levels .
  ?course_levels a :Course_Levels .
  ?language_schools_course_levels p:hasCourse_Levels ?course_levels .
  ?language_schools a :Language_Schools .
  ?language_schools_course_levels p:hasLanguage_Schools ?language_schools .
  ?language_schools p:name ?name .
  ?course_levels p:level ?level .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the level of courses each language school offers.
